name: Tandoori-Style Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. In a food processor or blender container, process all ingredients except chicken.
2. Pour the mixture into a 13 x 9 inches baking pan.
3. Add chicken and turn the pieces to coat well. Cover and chill at least 6 hours, turning chicken occasionally.
4. Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
5. In the same 13 x 9 inches baking pan, arrange chicken in a single layer and bake for 40-50 minutes or until chicken is tender.
6. Turn off control and broil chicken for 5 minutes until golden.
7. Garnish with lemon slices and parsley (optional). Makes 4 servings.
